items.claim: Sam Patterson has a weak chin and is susceptible to being hurt.
Sam Patterson will fight more recklessly in this matchup due to criticism from his previous fight.
items.quote: I think Sam's going to be more reckless than he is last fight, especially after all of the hate or bad comments he got after last fight.

items.claim: Muhammad Usman is stepping into this fight on super short notice.
items.quote: Muhammad Sed, nine wins, no losses... stepping on a super short notice.

items.claim: Dustin Jacobe was originally preparing for a different opponent, Uros Medic, before taking this short-notice matchup.
items.quote: Dustin Jacobe was getting ready for a fight against Urani Bodv. And I guess he had to pull out of the fight. So, this is a short notice matchup here.
